title: Living With Unpredictable Weather
sentences: Over the past few years, the weather here has grown increasingly unpredictable.
Where sunny mornings once guaranteed a pleasant afternoon, that is no longer reliable.
Locals have learned to carry an umbrella regardless of the forecast.
Farmers, in particular, have struggled to plan their harvests around such uncertainty.
While some blame shifting patterns on wider climate changes, others remain sceptical.
Whatever the cause, the practical effects are increasingly hard to ignore.
Sudden storms now interrupt outdoor events with little warning.
Having lived through several such surprises, I check the forecast obsessively.
Even so, forecasts themselves have become noticeably less dependable.
Adapting to this uncertainty has quietly become part of everyday life.
